prompts.name: Tropical Greenhouse Beauty
prompts.prompt: Steamy tropical greenhouse after rain: Raven-haired beauty inside a lush, fogged-up Victorian greenhouse at dusk, water droplets sliding down glass panes and giant monstera leaves, wearing a dripping-wet, ultra-sheer emerald-green chiffon baby-doll dress (totally see-through when wet, braless, no panties), thin satin straps slipping off her shoulders, bare feet on wet stone, slow hair flip as she arches back against a vine-covered column, golden-hour rays cutting through the mist and making the fabric cling like a second skin, exotic and seductive Helmut Newton jungle editorial, 4K ultra-realistic.

prompts.name: Abandoned Ballroom Blonde
prompts.prompt: Abandoned opulent ballroom at blue hour: Gorgeous blonde in a crumbling marble ballroom with shattered chandeliers, golden-blue twilight pouring through broken stained-glass windows, wearing an ultra-sheer black lace bodysuit with strategic floral embroidery (completely transparent everywhere else, no bra or panties beneath), paired with a tailored black velvet blazer worn open and slipping off one shoulder, sheer black thigh-high stockings with back seams, stiletto heels, slow sensual walk toward camera, hair cascading in loose waves, dust particles floating in the dramatic light beams, high-fashion Helmut Newton decadence, 4K cinematic.

prompts.name: Cyberpunk Rooftop Redhead
prompts.prompt: Neon-drenched cyberpunk rooftop at night: Stunning redhead perched on the edge of a rain-slicked Tokyo-inspired rooftop, city neon reflecting in puddles, wearing a soaked, ultra-sheer white silk men’s button-up shirt (fully unbuttoned, clinging transparently to her skin, nothing underneath), high-waisted black patent leather hot pants with silver chains dangling from the belt loops, thigh-high stiletto boots, wet hair slicked back, slow provocative lean toward camera with a defiant smirk, purple and pink neon glow illuminating every curve, wind whipping the open shirt, cyberpunk Helmut Newton editorial, 4K hyper-realistic.

prompts.name: Rooftop pool at dusk
prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic 4K slow-motion video of a stunning young woman with long dark hair standing beside an infinity pool on a luxury city rooftop at blue hour, wearing only an extremely thin, soaking-wet white ribbed tank top with no bra (fabric completely clinging, subtle nipple detail visible), tiny denim cutoff shorts unbuttoned at the top, city lights reflecting on wet skin, gentle wind, she slowly wrings water from her hair and looks seductively at camera, high-fashion cinematic aesthetic

prompts.name: Desert night, bonfire light
prompts.prompt: Cinematic golden-hour-to-night video: gorgeous brunette in the desert beside a crackling bonfire, wearing an ultra-sheer black mesh long-sleeve crop top (completely see-through in firelight, braless), low-slung leather mini skirt with oversized belt, firelight flickering across her skin, slow hair flip and sultry stare into camera, wind gently blowing the mesh fabric against her body, Helmut Newton inspired editorial style, 4K realistic

prompts.name: Luxury hotel balcony, rainstorm
prompts.prompt: Moody 4K slow-motion video on a high-rise hotel balcony during a warm summer rain: beautiful young woman with wet hair in a completely soaked, ultra-thin pale-grey men’s dress shirt (unbuttoned almost to navel, no bra, fabric turned semi-transparent and clinging perfectly), black lace thong barely visible underneath, city skyline behind, she leans against glass railing and lets rain run down her body while giving intense eye contact, erotic high-fashion film look
